items.name: Sausage Fry (3 pieces)
items.description: Deep fried sausage sprinkeled with spices and served with house sauce.

items.name: Papad (3 pieces)
items.description: Thin Nepali Wafer made of dried Lentils

items.name: Wings
items.description: Nepali Style Marinated chicken wings served with Peri Peri / BBQ / Bhoye Chhen Special Sauce

items.name: Bowl of Chips
items.description: A medium serves of crispy potato chips with regular salt along with tomato ketchup on the side.

items.name: Chips Chilli
items.description: Crispy potato chips sauteed with onions capsicum green onions, soy sauce, sweet and medium hot spicy sauce along with Nepalese herbs and flavouring spices.

items.name: Samosa
items.description: A Vegetarian samosa deep fried cooked and served with tomato ketchup / chilli / mild sauce.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: 10 pieces of puffed balls with the filling of boiled potato and onions served with spicy and tangy cold water. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Chatpat
items.description: A medium spicy mixture of puffed rice, roasted soybeans diced onions, tomatos, crunchy waiwai noodles, green onions, Nepalese Pickles, crushed crunchy puffed bails along with chilly spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Waiwai Sadeko
items.description: A roosted Wai-Wai crunchy noodles mixed up with the diced onions, tomatoes green onions, Nepalese pickles along with chilly spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Piro Alu
items.description: Nepali Style Steamed potato with Nepali Spices, herbs and green chilly. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Mixed Achar
items.description: Traditional Nepali Pickle made from potato, cucumber, carrot, radish, green/white peas, green chilli, sesame powder mixed with nepali spices and lemon juice. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Plain Wo with Alu Tama ko jhol
items.description: Nepali Style pan cake made from ground black lentils.

items.name: Egg Wo with Alu Tama ko Jhol
items.description: Nepali Style Pan Cake Made from Ground Black Lentils with egg on top.

items.name: Mixed Wo with Alu Tama ko Jhol
items.description: Nepali Style Pan Cake Made from Ground Black Lentils with egg and Chicken minced on top.

items.name: Chicken / Buff Choila
items.description: Spicy, marinated roasted chicken / buffalo mixed with green garlic leaves, garlic ginger paste and green chilli finished with Nepalese spices and mustard oil. Note: This dish is served cold.

items.name: Pangra Fry (Giblet Fry)
items.description: Stir fried chicken giblet with tomato, onion, green chilly and ginger garlic paste.

items.name: Chilly (Chicken / Buffalo / Sausage)
items.description: Boneless chicken / buffalo / sausage meat sautéed with onions capsicum green onions, soy sauce, sweet and medium hot spicy sauce along with Nepalese herbs and flavoring spices.

categories.name: Momo
categories.description: Nepalese style steamed dumplings with fillings of Vegetable / Chicken / Buffalo with ginger, garlic, coriander, onion and Nepalese spices served with homemade spices.

items.name: Chow Mein
items.description: Nepalese style stired fried noodles sauteed with veggies, garlic, ginger, soya sauce and flavouring of Nepalese herbs and spices.

items.name: Keema Noodles
items.description: Noodles mixed with special sauce made with Sichuan pepper, chilli flakes and garlic served with chicken mince and green Asian vege.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Steamed rice fired with the mixed vegetables and green onions along with ginger, garlic and soya sauce and finished with Nepalese herbs and spices

items.name: Dal Bhat Set
items.description: Rice, Pickle, Saag, Seasonal Tarkari, Meat (Chicken / Mutton), Salad, Papad

items.name: Bhoye Chhen Set
items.description: Chiura, Bhatmas, Piro Alu, Mixed Achar, Bodi Alu tama, Wo, Boiled egg, Chicken choila / Buff Choila, Pangra Fry, Yogurt, Gulab Jamun

items.name: Samay Baji Set
items.description: Chiura, Bodi, Kalo Bhatmas, Wo, Piro Alu, Mixed Achar, Boiled egg (half), Choila (Veg / Chicken / Buff)
